description_long: This is an adult male figure with a well-groomed beard and short hair, dressed in a casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted jeans. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended away from the body, hands relaxed and fingers naturally splayed. He wears low-top sneakers with visible soles, and his facial features are stylized but clearly defined. The clothing fits closely, showing the contours of the body, and the overall build is average and healthy. The figure's posture is neutral, suggesting he is at rest or waiting. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the style is typical for an urban pedestrian.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright in a relaxed pose, wearing a t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers with a short hairstyle and beard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, beard, t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the t-shirt and jeans, and the sneaker's side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt, jeans, and both sneakers from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg contours.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and fitted jeans
